title: bind: factor out RecursiveUnmount
body: Factor out logic for recursively unmounting our bind mounts, and make use of the parent/child relationship between mountpoints to decide which order to use, rather than sorting based on their mountpoint paths.

comments.body: LGTM, thanks for the function name change to keep my OCD at bay!  :^)
